papers.title: Parallel-SFT: Improving Zero-Shot Cross-Programming-Language Transfer for Code RL
papers.summary: Modern language models demonstrate impressive coding capabilities in common programming languages (PLs), such as C++ and Python, but their performance in lower-resource PLs is often limited by training data availability....

news.title: LWN.net Weekly Edition for April 16, 2026
news.abstract: LWN.net Weekly Edition for April 16, 2026 [LWN.net] LWN .net News from the source Content Weekly Edition Archives Search Kernel Security Events calendar Unread comments LWN FAQ Write for us Edition ⇒Front page Brief items Announcements One big page Previous week Following week Download EPUB User: P
news.summary: LWN.net 2026年4月16日周刊重点内容：AI安全研究迎来爆发期，LLM工具已能快速发现真实安全漏洞，但维护者面临处理大量报告的压力；Vim因新AI政策出现两个分支项目，旨在避免使用LLM生成的代码；Linux内核透明大页(THP)相关变更，取消page cache的只读透明大页支持；此外还包括OpenWrt One路由器的许可证合规构建系统、7.0内核开发统计等话题。
